Consignee 'Lider Gemi Sanayi Turizm Nakliyat ve Ticaret Ltd.Sti.' matches invoice 'Invoice to' field exactly.

consignor.certificate_value: Berg Prop Prod. AB, Tärnvägen 15, SE-475 40, HÖNÖ, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Berg Propulsion Production AB, Andvagen 26, SE-47540, Hono Sweden (footer); BERG PROPULSION (header/logo); VAT: SE556568305801

comparison_steps.description: Koncernstruktur – Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate consignor is 'Berg Prop Prod. AB'. Searching for this exact string in invoice text: not found as exact match. However, 'Berg Prop' appears as a substring component. Proceeding to 4.1.3 sequential testing.

Certificate: 'Berg Prop Prod. AB'. Invoice: 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'. These names differ: 'Prop' vs 'Propulsion' and 'Prod.' vs 'Production'. However, 'Prop' could be a commercial abbreviation of 'Propulsion' and 'Prod.' a commercial abbreviation of 'Production'. Proceeding to 4.1.3.3 (commercial abbreviation).
The name does not appear truncated due to field limitation. 'Prop' and 'Prod.' appear to be deliberate abbreviations, not truncation artifacts. The name is complete with 'AB' at the end.

Certificate: 'Berg Prop Prod. AB'. Invoice: 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'. Analysis: 'Prop' is a vedertagen (established) commercial abbreviation of 'Propulsion'. 'Prod.' (with period indicating abbreviation) is a vedertagen commercial abbreviation of 'Production'. 'Berg' matches exactly. 'AB' matches exactly. The abbreviated form consists of clear and established abbreviations of the words in the full legal name. The full legal name 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' is explicitly stated in the invoice footer. No other legal entity with similar name structure in the invoice. Country: Sweden in certificate matches Sweden in invoice footer. VAT prefix SE confirms Sweden. No contradicting information. ALL conditions of 4.1.3.3 are met → MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Commercial abbreviation – 'Prop' for 'Propulsion' and 'Prod.' for 'Production' are established commercial abbreviations
Land verification via VAT prefix SE in SE556568305801 confirms Sweden

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' was verified against invoice issuer 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' via rule 4.1.3.3 (commercial abbreviation). 'Prop' is a well-established abbreviation of 'Propulsion', and 'Prod.' (with trailing period) is a well-established abbreviation of 'Production'. The core name 'Berg' and legal form 'AB' match exactly. Country Sweden is confirmed via explicit mention in invoice footer address and VAT prefix SE. No other entity with similar name exists in the invoice.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Different legal entities: 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' and 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' are different companies
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The name differences are exclusively commercial abbreviations (Prop→Propulsion, Prod.→Production). The period after 'Prod' signals abbreviation. Same legal form (AB), same country (Sweden). Invoice has only one issuer entity. Rule 4.1.3.3 explicitly permits this.

comparison_steps.reasoning: No article numbers are present in the certificate. Proceeding to Priority 2 (text matching).

Certificate item 1: 'One shipset of Twin Berg Propulsion Propeller Equipment type MPP690F with Accessories Part 2/2 - 21 cases'. Invoice item 1: 'One shipset of Twin Berg Propulsion Propeller Equipment type MPP690F with Accessories Part 2/2 21 cases / 9.660,00 kg'. The identity-bearing main designation 'Twin Berg Propulsion Propeller Equipment type MPP690F with Accessories' can be identified exactly in the invoice. 'Part 2/2' and '21 cases' also match. The invoice adds '/ 9.660,00 kg' which is additional information per 4.3.4 → does not affect product identity.

Certificate item 2: 'One shipset of Single Berg Propulsion MTT113FP with Accessories Part 2/2 - 3 cases'. Invoice item 2: 'One shipset of Single Berg Propulsion MTT113FP with Accessories Part 2/2 3 cases / 1.480,00 kg'. The identity-bearing main designation 'Single Berg Propulsion MTT113FP with Accessories' can be identified exactly in the invoice. 'Part 2/2' and '3 cases' also match. The invoice adds '/ 1.480,00 kg' → additional non-identity-bearing information.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation identified exactly in invoice for both items
Additional weight information in invoice does not affect product identity

goods_description.debug_explanation: Both goods items in the certificate can be identified exactly in the invoice via controlled text matching. Item 1: 'One shipset of Twin Berg Propulsion Propeller Equipment type MPP690F with Accessories Part 2/2 - 21 cases' matches invoice description word for word (except dash formatting and added weight info). Item 2: 'One shipset of Single Berg Propulsion MTT113FP with Accessories Part 2/2 - 3 cases' similarly matches. No article numbers present, so Priority 2 (text matching) was used. The invoice reference 'Order 7654M&T1' in the certificate matches invoice order number '7654M&T1'.

comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate box 7 states '24: GW 11.140,00kg'. This contains: number of packages (24), weight category (GW = Gross Weight), numeric value (11.140,00 using European notation = 11140.00), and unit (kg). The '24' corresponds to 24 cases mentioned in box 6.

Certificate GW: 11.140,00 kg (European notation: period as thousands separator, comma as decimal → 11140.00 kg). Invoice total line: '24 cases / 11.140,00 kg' (same European notation → 11140.00 kg). After thousands separator normalization (4.4.3.3): 11140.00 = 11140.00. Exact match. Additionally, 24 cases in certificate matches '24 cases' in invoice total line.

Certificate explicitly states 'GW' (Gross Weight). Invoice total line states '11.140,00 kg' without explicit GW/NW category. However, per 4.4.4: 'Skillnad i benämning mellan viktkategori i certifikatet och fakturan ska i sig INTE medföra MISMATCH när det numeriska värdet och viktenheten överensstämmer.' The numeric value (11140.00) and unit (kg) match. Also, per 4.4.2.2 point 2: certificate states ONE weight value without ambiguity (the GW), the value can be identified in the invoice, and the invoice does NOT contain a contradicting alternative weight value of another category. This situation is acceptable.

Both certificate and invoice use European notation with period as thousands separator (11.140). After normalization: 11140.00 kg in both documents. Values are integers with two decimal zeros, matching exactly.

rules_applied.description: Numeric value 11140.00 kg identified in invoice total line, matching certificate GW 11140.00 kg
Weight category label difference (GW in cert vs unlabeled in invoice) does not cause MISMATCH when numeric value and unit match

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '24: GW 11.140,00kg'. After European notation normalization (period as thousands separator, comma as decimal): 24 packages at GW 11140.00 kg. Invoice total line states 'Totally 24 cases / 11.140,00 kg', which after same normalization = 24 cases / 11140.00 kg. Both the package count (24) and weight (11140.00 kg) match exactly. The invoice per-line weights also sum correctly: 9660.00 + 1480.00 = 11140.00 kg (verification only, not required by rules). Weight category GW is stated in certificate but not in invoice total; per rule 4.4.4 this difference does not cause MISMATCH when numeric value and unit match.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because invoice does not label weight as GW
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.4.4 explicitly states that difference in weight category label shall not cause MISMATCH when numeric value and unit match. Also 4.4.2.2 point 2: single weight value without contradicting alternative → acceptable.

comparison_steps.reasoning: Invoice contains explicit field 'Country of origin: Sweden' below the goods description and total line.
Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'Sweden'. Exact match after normalization.

rules_applied.description: Origin explicitly stated in invoice as 'Country of origin: Sweden'
Certificate origin 'Sweden' matches invoice origin 'Sweden' exactly

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'Sweden' as country of origin. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Direct and exact match. Single origin country, no mixed origins to resolve.

rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.

Two files received: certificate file and invoice file. Certificate identified in Document A. Invoice identified in Document B. Invoice number 7654M&T1 matches between certificate remarks and invoice header.
All three criteria met: invoice number match (7654M&T1), consignor identifiable (Berg Prop Prod. AB → Berg Propulsion Production AB via commercial abbreviation), consignee identifiable (exact match).
'Prop' is established abbreviation of 'Propulsion'. 'Prod.' (with period) is established abbreviation of 'Production'. Full legal name explicitly in invoice. Same country. No other entity.
VAT prefix 'SE' in 'SE556568305801' confirms Sweden. Also explicit 'Sweden' in invoice footer address.
Invoice contains explicit 'Invoice to' field → this is the primary billing field used for consignee verification.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Both items' identity-bearing main designations found exactly in invoice.
European notation period as thousands separator in '11.140,00' normalized to 11140.00.
Invoice weight lacks GW/NW label but numeric value and unit match certificate GW.
Explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden' field in invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' i certifikatet kunde verifieras som en vedertagen förkortning av 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' på fakturan. Mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet (24 kollin / 11 140 kg bruttovikt) och ursprungsland Sverige matchar alla mellan dokumenten. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

summary_per_checkpoint.note: Berg Prop Prod. AB verified as commercial abbreviation of Berg Propulsion Production AB. Country Sweden confirmed.
Lider Gemi Sanayi Turizm Nakliyat ve Ticaret Ltd.Sti. matches exactly in Invoice to field. Country Turkiye matches.
Both items (Twin Berg Propulsion MPP690F and Single Berg Propulsion MTT113FP) match exactly via text matching.
24 cases / GW 11140.00 kg matches invoice total of 24 cases / 11140.00 kg exactly.
Sweden matches explicitly stated 'Country of origin: Sweden' in invoice.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.rule_applied: Kommersiell förkortning (4.1.3.3) – 'Prop' är en vedertagen förkortning av 'Propulsion' och 'Prod.' av 'Production'. Fullt juridiskt namn explicit i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' identifieras som en kommersiell förkortning av fakturans utställare 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'. Förkortningarna 'Prop' (Propulsion) och 'Prod.' (Production) är vedertagna. Juridisk bolagsform AB matchar. Land Sverige bekräftat via adress och VAT-prefix SE.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning – företagsnamn, adress och land identiska efter normalisering av versaler.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee matchar exakt med fakturans 'Invoice to'-fält efter normalisering av versaler (TURKIYE → Turkiye). Företagsnamn, gatuadress, postnummer, stad och land är identiska.

sections.certificate_value: One shipset of Twin Berg Propulsion Propeller Equipment type MPP690F with Accessories Part 2/2 - 21 cases; One shipset of Single Berg Propulsion MTT113FP with Accessories Part 2/2 - 3 cases
sections.invoice_value: One shipset of Twin Berg Propulsion Propeller Equipment type MPP690F with Accessories Part 2/2 21 cases / 9.660,00 kg; One shipset of Single Berg Propulsion MTT113FP with Accessories Part 2/2 3 cases / 1.480,00 kg
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3) – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningar identifieras exakt i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Båda varuposterna i certifikatet kan identifieras exakt i fakturan genom kontrollerad textmatchning. Artikel 1: 'Twin Berg Propulsion Propeller Equipment type MPP690F' finns ordagrant i fakturan. Artikel 2: 'Single Berg Propulsion MTT113FP' finns ordagrant i fakturan. Tillägg av vikter per rad i fakturan utgör icke-identitetsbärande tillägg som inte påverkar matchningen.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.3) med tusentalsavskiljarnormalisering (4.4.3.3). Viktkategoriskillnad accepterad enligt 4.4.4.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 24 kollin med GW 11.140,00 kg. Fakturan anger 'Totally 24 cases / 11.140,00 kg'. Efter normalisering av europeisk tusentalsavskiljare (punkt) blir båda värdena 11140,00 kg — exakt matchning. Antal kollin (24) matchar. Fakturan anger inte GW/NW-etikett men per regel 4.4.4 ska detta inte medföra MISMATCH när numeriskt värde och enhet överensstämmer.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning (4.5.1, 4.5.5) – ursprungsland explicit angivet i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'Sweden' i ruta 3 (Country of Origin). Fakturan anger explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Exakt matchning.

output_quality_checks.consistency_details: All 5 checkpoints have status MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL and no blocking issues. All checkpoint confidences are ≥ 0.85, meeting the confidence floor requirement for IDENTICAL.
